hero.title: About CareTip
hero.mission: We make tipping simpler, fairer, and more transparent for hospitality teams, so great service is recognised when it happens.

story.title: Two cities. One mission: appreciation that truly lands.
story.intro: Behind CareTip are [Name 1] & [Name 2], two founders from Berlin, united by a shared vision and two of Europe's most dynamic cities.
story.origin: When one of us moved her life to London, the idea for CareTip was born. In the UK, daily life is already digital: paying cashlessly and tipping effortlessly with a scan is simply normal. Back in Germany, one thing was clear, our hospitality and service culture needed this upgrade too. Urgently.
story.visionP1: We all feel it in everyday life and see it in the news: society depends on people in service and care roles. They keep our routines running, create unforgettable evenings, and do hard work on the front line. Yet the recognition they deserve, financial and emotional, often never arrives. Staff shortages and unfilled shifts are the painful result.
story.visionP2: At the same time, cash is fading fast. Teams pay the price: when guests have no notes in their pocket, well-earned tips never make it through.
story.quote: We refuse to watch excellent service go unrewarded. CareTip is our answer: we're reinventing tipping to give service teams back the appreciation and financial boost they deserve.
story.driveBody: CareTip isn't just a tech project for us. It's a tool for fair success, stronger teams, and future-ready businesses. We bridge modern digital convenience, 100% reliable infrastructure, highest data security, and genuine human recognition.
story.driveClosing: Because Caring is Tipping: contactless, direct, and tax-free.

missionSection.title: What we stand for
missionSection.m1Body: Hospitality and service staff deserve recognition that reaches them directly, not lost in cashless moments or admin friction.
missionSection.m2Body: Guests scan, tip, and go. No app downloads, no awkward cash exchanges, just a smooth flow built for real venues.
missionSection.m3Body: Managers see clear records, fair distribution, and live activity, so trust stays high across every shift.

trustSection.title: Built on trust
trustSection.t1Body: Every tip runs through Stripe's trusted checkout, encrypted, familiar, and built for European businesses.
trustSection.t2Body: Clear records for teams and leadership. No black boxes, just accountable tipping from scan to payout.
trustSection.t3Body: From restaurants and hotels to field services, CareTip fits how European teams work today.

howItWorks.s1Body: Register your business workspace in minutes. Add your venue details, verify your account, and get a clean dashboard ready for locations, staff, and payouts.
howItWorks.s2Body: Invite managers and staff with email or invite codes. Assign roles, organize by location, and keep everyone connected to the right tipping permissions.
howItWorks.s3Body: Create branded QR codes for individuals, team pools, or tables. Preview designs, export print ready PDFs, and share dynamic links when you do not need print.
howItWorks.s4Title: Place QR at tables & service points
howItWorks.s4Body: Place your QR codes where your customers, patients, or relatives naturally interact: in care units, on flyers, displays, or directly on workwear. CareTip blends subtly and seamlessly into your daily operations and brand identity.
howItWorks.s5Body: Guests scan with their phone camera. No app download. They choose an amount, pay with card or wallet, and land on a clear confirmation in seconds.
howItWorks.s6Body: Staff get real-time notifications when a tip lands. They see live earnings, activity in their wallet, and confidence that great service was recognized immediately.
howItWorks.s7Body: Owners and managers monitor tips by location, shift, and team member. Analytics widgets, top performer cards, and activity feeds keep the floor and back office aligned.
howItWorks.s8Body: Every tip is recorded in CareTip with clear records for managers and staff. Businesses distribute tips on their own schedule; CareTip keeps the audit trail transparent.
howItWorks.s9Body: Higher tip participation, happier teams, and stronger guest experiences compound over time. CareTip helps you measure engagement and celebrate momentum across every location.
howItWorks.trustTitle: Trust and speed for every shift
howItWorks.trust1Body: Card data is handled by certified processors; connections use modern encryption so guest payments and business data stay protected end to end.
howItWorks.trust2Body: Web and mobile experiences stay in sync so managers and staff see updates whether they are on site or on the go.

faq.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to know about CareTip, digital tipping, team management, and secure payouts.

items.q: Are payments and customer data secure?
items.a: Yes, absolutely. All transactions are processed through Stripe, one of the world's leading payment providers, certified as a PCI-DSS Level 1 Service Provider (the highest security standard in the card industry) and compliant with the European PSD2 directive. CareTip never touches or stores your card or banking details. All personal data is processed strictly in accordance with GDPR and applicable data protection law.

items.q: How do I know this QR code is safe?
items.a:
All CareTip QR codes lead exclusively to our secured website caretip.de. After scanning, you can always verify the URL in your browser's address bar. Look for the padlock icon and the https connection. This confirms the connection is encrypted and the page is genuine.

By the way: you don't have to scan the QR code at all. You can simply type the URL shown on the display (e.g. caretip.de/ava) directly into your browser and leave a tip just as easily and securely through the website.
No. CareTip does not store any card details. All payments are processed entirely through Stripe, the same provider trusted by Amazon, Google and Shopify. Your card data never leaves our platform.

Yes, fully. CareTip was built from the ground up with privacy at its core. We comply with all requirements of the GDPR and give users full control over their data at all times, including the right to access and deletion.

items.q: How does CareTip work – how do customers leave a tip?
items.a: Customers simply scan a QR code or type the URL directly into their browser, with no download, no registration, and no app required. After scanning, they select an amount and pay via credit card, Apple Pay or Google Pay. The tip goes directly and transparently to the team. The whole process takes under 30 seconds.

items.q: Do my customers need an app?
items.a: No, neither customers nor employees need an app. The QR code opens directly in the smartphone's browser. No account, no password, no barriers. As seamless as possible.

items.q: How quickly can I set up CareTip?
items.a: You're live in just a few minutes. No hardware, no IT department, no long onboarding process. After registration, you receive your personalised QR codes, print them out, place them, done. For larger businesses with multiple locations, we personally guide you through the setup.

items.q: What does CareTip cost for my business?
items.a: CareTip works on a transparent model with no hidden fees. A small service fee applies per transaction, meaning you only pay when your team actually receives a tip. You can find all details on our pricing page or by speaking directly with us.

items.q: Does the tip actually reach the employee?
items.a: Yes, and that is our core promise. Every payment is directly assigned to the employee profile linked to the QR code. Business owners and employees can track earnings transparently in the dashboard at any time. No tip is ever lost.

items.q: Are digital tips tax-free for my team?
items.a: Yes. In Germany, voluntary tips for employees are completely exempt from income tax and social security contributions under Section 3 No. 51 EStG. CareTip is technically designed to preserve this tax-free status 100%, with payments flowing as voluntary guest contributions directly to employees, with no employer withholding. We still recommend a one-time check with your tax advisor for your specific business structure.

realLife.title: How CareTip works in real life
realLife.s1Text: Customers scan the QR code on the vehicle, delivery notice, or parcel and tip in seconds. No app downloads, no cash needed.
realLife.s1Detail: Display your custom QR codes on delivery vans, handheld scanners, missed delivery cards, or as stickers directly on the packages. The customer opens the tipping screen instantly in their mobile browser, picks an amount, and pays securely using their card or preferred digital wallet. Whether the tip is assigned straight to the individual driver or contributed to a depot wide pool, your dashboard updates in real time. Operations managers can track performance and boost driver motivation, even during peak delivery seasons.
realLife.s1Alt: Logistics and delivery tipping at the doorstep with a QR code
realLife.s2Text: A quick scan at check-in or check-out is the perfect solution for concierge, bell, and housekeeping teams. Seamless and completely cashless.
realLife.s2Detail: Display your branded QR codes as countertop displays at the desk, on key card holders, or via a tablet link at reception. Guests can tip porters, the concierge, or housekeeping effortlessly, without hunting for spare cash or dealing with awkward tip envelopes. Finance sees every single transaction tracked in one central hub, making shift handovers and month end reporting far simpler for hotel management.
realLife.s2Alt: Hotel reception with guest tipping at check-in or check-out
realLife.s3Text: A quick scan at the nurse station or bedside lets patients and families thank nursing teams, ward staff, and support crews in seconds. Dignified, discreet, and completely cashless.
realLife.s3Detail: Display your branded QR codes at ward counters, on care cards, or via a tablet at the nurses' station. Families can show gratitude for compassionate care instantly, without awkward cash handoffs or paper envelopes. Ward managers and hospital leadership track every thank-you in one central dashboard, keeping recognition fair, transparent, and motivating for every shift.
realLife.s3Alt: Hospital ward where patients and families thank care teams digitally
realLife.s4Text: A quick scan after a postpartum home visit, tipped in seconds. No app required, completely cashless.
realLife.s4Detail: Share your QR code easily after your care session or print it directly on business cards and info brochures. Exhausted new parents can say thank you right from their smartphones, no searching for cash or envelopes needed. Every token of appreciation and digital tip gathers automatically in your personal CareTip dashboard, so you keep a perfect, transparent overview of your freelance earnings while focusing fully on the families.
realLife.s4Alt: Independent midwife after postpartum home visit with digital tipping via QR code
realLife.s5Text: Tip from anywhere via link or QR code, the direct solution for home care, trades, and mobile services.
realLife.s5Detail: Share a personal link via SMS or WhatsApp after the visit, or show the QR code on your business card. Customers reward great service right in their mobile browser via card, Apple Pay, or Google Pay. Appreciation lands in the same system as your in-venue team while your dashboard updates in real time, so your entire field crew feels direct recognition for the work they deliver on site.
realLife.s5Alt: Field and mobile service tipping via link or QR code on site

dashboard.guidelinesDialogDesc: Practical steps to get your team set up and grow tips. This is a quick reference you can save or print for your staff room.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionOnboardLi1: Invite team members from <highlight>Team</highlight> using your business invite code or add them directly with name and role.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionOnboardLi2: Ask each staff member to complete their profile and confirm they can sign in to the employee dashboard.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionOnboardLi3: Deactivate former staff promptly so tips and QR codes stay accurate.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionPrintLi1: Open <highlight>QR codes</highlight> and download each staff member's branded QR.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionPrintLi2: Print on durable cards or tent cards; place them where guests naturally look (reception, tables, checkout).
dashboard.guidelinesSectionPrintLi3: Re-print when names or roles change so scans always match the right person.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionTipsLi1: Train staff to mention CareTip at key moments: end of service, checkout, or when guests thank them.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionTipsLi2: Keep QR codes visible and unobstructed; a quick "scan to tip" sign boosts completion rates.
dashboard.guidelinesSectionTipsLi3: Review your dashboard regularly, recognize top performers, and share feedback with the team.
dashboard.guidelinesFooter: A full PDF guideline may be added later; for now this page is your in-app reference.
